response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; there is no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols, and cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK without Azure or embedded system security context required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven systems and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL usage in professional roles
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, industrial cybersecurity, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
Lacks hands-on experience with cloud platforms (Azure), MQTT, or scalable on-premises industrial systems
